MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-10-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JOSEPH M. PLEASANT, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-10-2004 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-25-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY RON SINCLAIR. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-21-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-12-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-21-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
